debug_info.goal:
f : ℂ → ℂ
h : Meromorphic f
⊢ ∃ const, ∀ (r : ℝ), r ≠ 0 → characteristic f ⊤ r = circleAverage (fun x => logCounting f (↑x) r) 0 1 + const

failed_attempts: exact ⟨_, fun r hr => characteristic_top_eq_circleAverage_logCounting_add_constant h hr⟩
exact ⟨_, fun r hr => characteristic_eq_circleAverage_logCounting hr h⟩
exact ⟨_, fun r hr => characteristic_eq_circleAverage_logCounting h hr⟩
exact ⟨_, fun r hr => characteristic_top_eq_circleAverage_logCounting h hr⟩
exact ⟨log (leadingLaurent f 0).abs, fun r hr => characteristic_eq_circleAverage_logCounting h hr⟩
exact ⟨logPlus (abs (leadingCoeff f 0)), fun r hr => characteristic_eq_circleAverage_logCounting h hr⟩
exact ⟨_, fun r hr => characteristic_top_eq_circleAverage_logCounting_add_log_leading_coeff_average h hr⟩
exact ⟨_, fun r hr => characteristic_eq_circleAverage_logCounting h hr⟩

use circleAverage (fun w ↦ log (abs (leadingCoeff (f - fun _ ↦ w) 0))) 0 1 - log (abs (leadingCoeff f 0))
  intro r hr
  rw [characteristic_top_eq_circleAverage_log_abs h hr,
    circleAverage_logCounting_eq_circleAverage_log_abs h hr (logCounting_circleIntegrable h)]
  ring
exact ⟨_, fun r hr ↦ characteristic_eq_circleAverage_logCounting_add_log_mag_leadingCoeff h hr⟩
exact ⟨_, fun r hr => characteristic_eq_circleAverage_logCounting h hr⟩

refine ⟨circleAverage (fun z ↦ log ‖leadingCoeff (f - fun _ ↦ z) 0‖) 0 1, fun r hr ↦ ?_⟩
  simp_rw [characteristic, m_top_eq_circleAverage_log_plus hr h,
    logCounting_eq_circleAverage_log_abs_sub_jensen_const hr h,
    circleAverage_comm (logCounting_circleIntegrable h), circleAverage_log_abs_sub_unit_circle]
  abel
